utterances.speaker: Fake Monica
utterances.text: I am not too bad . Fortunately , blue my colour . How ... how did you know I was here ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Because ... I am Monica Geller . It was my credit card you were using .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I want you to know , it was not me who turned you in .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: No , thank you ! You have given me so much ! I mean , if it was not for you , I would never have gotten to sing Memories on the stage at the Wintergarden Theater !

utterances.speaker: Fake Monica
utterances.text: Well , actually , you only got to sing Memo ...

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I just can not believe you are in here .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I mean , what am I gonna do without you ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Who gonna crash the embassy parties with me ?
